title: OpenUP iteration state (v2)
description: Machine-readable state for a single OpenUP iteration. Written by skills via scripts/openup-state.py, read by hooks. Never hand-edit. Schema 2 (T-078) names the iteration (`iteration_id`) and project cycle (`cycle`); `phase` is a derived cache. A schema-1 file is auto-migrated on read.

iteration_id.description: Pointer to the iteration-plan instance that committed this lane (e.g. "C3"); null for a single-lane / promote-degenerate start with no multi-lane iteration plan (T-077/T-078).

cycle.description: Project lifecycle cycle counter (supports return-to-Construction; T-075). Derived from openup-lifecycle.py; defaults to 1.

phase.description: OpenUP lifecycle phase. DERIVED CACHE stamped from openup-lifecycle.py status (T-075) — not hand-set; the source of truth is the milestone decision records in docs/product/milestones/.

worktree.description: Absolute path to the working tree.

session_id.description: Claude Code session id, or null if unknown.

started_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the iteration state was created.

plan_persisted.description: false = not done; string = path to the persisted plan.

iterations_since_retro.description: Count of iterations completed since the last retrospective.
